titleStmt.title: SII 34.409: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 409. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Sundarēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is said to be an order of Chōḻagaṅgadēvaṉ, obviously a high official. He ordered that some 15 mā of land purchased by a goldsmith and another person called Viḻuppādarāyar be made a tax-free dēvadāna of the deities installed by the goldsmith in the temple in the name of Chōḻagaṅgadēvaṉ. By the terms of the dēvadāna, the kārāṇmai (ownership and cultivation right) of the gift land will be vested with the donors and the kaḍamai (government revenue/ upper share) will go to the deities. The kaḍamai on this land was however fixed at half of the prevailing rate.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
naṉṟāka svastiśrī cōḻakaṅkatēvaṉ Ōlai śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟku yāṇṭu patinoṉṟāvatu mārkaḻimātam Añcāntiyati veṇpuḷa nāṭṭuc ceṅkāṭṭirukkai Iṭattuvaḷi Uṭaiyār kuṟaḷ māṇīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyilil Eḻum pōtaṉṟu yiruvaṉāṉa Iṭattuvaḷit taṭṭāṉ nampērālē Eḻuntaru
ḷivittamutaliyār Iṉakku nalla perumāḷukkum nācciyāṟkum pirā pālaṉāṉa viḻuppātarāyar Eḻuntaruḷivitta tiruvīti nācciyāṟku Iṟaiili tēvatāṉamāka Ivvūr pukalōka kaṇṭapperēriyil mēlai maṭaiyāl nīrpāntu viḷaiyum naṉcey nilattil mutaliyāṟkum nācciyāṟkum Iṭattuvaḷi Ūrār kaiyyāl Iṭattuvaḷi taṭṭāṉ
Ūrañcāti vilai koṇṭa Ūraḷavukōlāl nilam pattum 10 m tiruvīti nācciyāṟku viḻuppātarāyar Ūrañcātiyāka vilai koṇṭa nilam Añcumāvum Ākat tiruccūlakkallukkuṭpaṭṭa nilam patiṉañcumāvum Ivarkaḷukkuk kārāṇmaiyum nāyamāṟkuk kaṭamai Āka Iṉṉilattukku Ivarkaḷ kaṭamai Iṟukkumpaṭi payir pāttum pāḻcāvi nīkkip payir niṉṟa nilattukku Iṭattuvaḷi Ūrkkā
lāl māttāl mukkalanē Iṟukkavum karuñce veṭṭikkuṟucci Uṭaiyār kuṟaḷ māṇīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār tēvatāṉattukku mēṟkum teṉṉellai peruntūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum mēlellai ceṉṉilaikkuṭi Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai vāṟapaṟṟukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam Ūrañcātiyāka vilai koṇṭa nilam mutaliyārum nācciyārkum ni
lam Irupatumāvum tiruvītinācciyāṟku nilam pattumāvum Āka tiruccūlakkallukkuṭpaṭṭa nilam muppatu māvum pōka nīkkik kārāṇmaiyum nāyamāṟkuk kaṭamai Iṟukkavum kaṭamai Iṟukkum paṭi payirpāttu pāḻcāvi nīkkip payir niṉṟa nilattukku pala tēvatāṉattil Iṟukkuṅ kaṭamaiyil Oṉṟupātik kaṭamai Iṟukkavum Ippaṭikku Ūrañcātiyāka vilai koṇṭa paṭiyilē nāmuṅ koṭuttōm Ippaṭikku Ivvōlai piṭi
pāṭākak koṇṭu cantirāttavar cella kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka
Ivai Iṉakku nalla perumāḷāṉa cōḻakaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
